# OCCP — OpenCloud Control Plane

> Agent Control Plane with Verified Autonomy Pipeline.
> Every autonomous action verified, logged, and reversible — before it runs.

## Documentation

- [OCCP Docs](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/index.md): The Agent Control Plane with Verified Autonomy Pipeline.
- [Verified Autonomy](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/concepts/verified-autonomy.md): The 5-gate pipeline that makes autonomous agents defensible.
- [Your first agent — from zero to deployed](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/guides/first-agent.md): A 10-minute walkthrough from `create-occp-app` to a live agent.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/quickstart.md): Run your first verified agent action in under 5 minutes.

## Optional

- [API Reference (OpenAPI JSON)](https://api.occp.ai/api/v1/openapi.json)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/azar-management-consulting/occp-core)
